title: AN ACT DECLARING MARCH TWENTY OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF SAN FERNANDO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION

chunks.text:
H. No. 2163 / 97 OG No. 18, 2571 (April 30, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8945, August 24, 2000 ]

AN ACT DECLARING MARCH TWENTY OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF SAN FERNANDO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. March twenty of every year is hereby declared a special working holiday in the City of San Fernando, Province of La Union to commemorate the creation of said city.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which

originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 7, 2000

and May 29, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved:

August

24,

2000

(Sgd.) JOSEPH E.

ESTRADA

President of the Philippines
